title: Three Holy Spirit Steps to Reclaim Your Mornings
summary: Screens buzz, calendars swell, and quiet time with God slips to the margins. This simple three-step rhythm—mind, Word, prayer—turns distracted mornings into grounded, joy-filled starts.

title: Stop Waiting: Build a Life That Matters Today
summary: If you can make your life worse in a moment, you can make it better on purpose. Seth Godin argues that the path to a meaningful life is not paved by permission, perfection, or popularity—but by agency
